uiIssues.description: Image 2 (src: "(unknown src)") has no alt attribute or an empty one.
uiIssues.impact: Screen readers announce this image as "image" with no context, making it meaningless to visually-impaired users. Search engines also use alt text to index images, so missing alt text reduces SEO value.
uiIssues.recommendation: Add a descriptive alt attribute that conveys the purpose or content of the image. For purely decorative images use alt="" (empty string) to tell screen readers to skip it.
